info.description: This is the backend API for my portfolio website.
info.title: Portfolio Website API

get.description: Retrieve active chat sessions for the authenticated user
Retrieve the message history for a specific chat session

post.description: Triggers a manual refresh of the Vector Store for the authenticated user

get.description: Initiates a WebSocket connection for real-time portfolio chat. Requires session_id and user_id.
Get a paginated list of experiences (requires auth)

post.description: Create a new experience or education entry

get.description: Get a paginated list of public experiences
Get a single experience by its ID

patch.description: Change the visibility of an experience

Get a paginated list of public project categories

Get a paginated list of public projects
Get a single project by its ID

patch.description: Change the visibility of a project

Get a paginated list of public reviews
Get a single review by its ID

patch.description: Change the visibility of a review

get.description: Get a paginated list of skills

Get a single skill group by its ID

patch.description: Change the visibility of a skill group

Get a single skill by its ID
